aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Driven but थोड़ा impatient

💼 Career: Jaldi decision lene ka pressure hoga

❤️ Love: छोटी बात pe irritation aa sakta hai

💰 Money: खर्च control karna zaruri

🧘 Advice: Pause karke react karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: हर urgency real nahi hoti
